Your landlord

The landlord has informed you that the rent will be increased by €100.00 starting next month. They also provided the IBAN `US133000000121212121212` for rent payments. 

To adjust your payment, you can either:

Would you like to proceed with one of these options? If so, please let me know the new rent amount and the date for the payment.
